name: Shiho Hiroto, the Black Eagle

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Fearless
traits.description: This model is immune to Fear and Terrifying.

traits.name: Inspiring
traits.description: Friendly models within M of this model may reroll failed Fear and Will tests.

traits.name: Guerrilla Fighter
traits.description: This model does not need line of sight to move into base contact with an enemy.

kiFeats.name: Eagle's Dive
kiFeats.description: This model may immediately move up to L range directly toward an enemy model. If it contacts the enemy, make an immediate free melee attack.

kiFeats.name: Black Eagle Strikes
kiFeats.description: Make three separate melee attacks against any combination of enemy models within S range.

kiFeats.name: Rallying War Cry
kiFeats.description: All friendly models within M immediately remove one Condition marker of your choice.

special: The once-exiled lord of the Shiho Clan has returned to reclaim his birthright. Shiho Hiroto is one of the most dangerous models in the game — exceptionally high stats across the board with the mobility and feats to match.

name: Tanaka Kazuo & Heir

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Tactician
traits.description: At the start of the game, draw one additional scenario card.

traits.name: Paired
traits.description: Kazuo and his Heir are always deployed and act together, but as separate models.

kiFeats.name: Honour Thy Clan
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within M gains Fearless until the end of the round.

kiFeats.name: Strategic Mind
kiFeats.description: Move up to two friendly models within L range up to their full move distance.

special: A senior Shiho commander and his son. Two models that support each other and the warband through tactical positioning.

name: Wolf Spears

traits.name: Spear
traits.description: This model's melee attacks have Reach.

traits.name: Pack
traits.description: This model may be taken in groups of 1 to 3. Each model in the pack activates together as a group.

traits.name: Wolf Totem
traits.description: While within M of another Wolf Spears model, this model gains +1 Strength.

special: Elite Shiho warriors bearing wolf iconography. Stronger in packs — the more Wolf Spears on the table, the more dangerous each one becomes.

name: Wolf Ryoshi

traits.name: Ranged (2)
traits.description: This model may make ranged attacks with a range band of 2.

traits.name: Pack
traits.description: This model may be taken in groups of 1 to 3.

traits.name: Wolf Totem
traits.description: While within M of another Wolf model, this model gains +1 to ranged attack rolls.

traits.name: Skirmisher
traits.description: This model may fire into melee without penalty.

special: Wolf-themed Shiho hunters skilled at ranging ahead of the warband and picking off isolated targets.

name: Loyal Yarimen

traits.name: Spear
traits.description: This model's melee attacks have Reach.

traits.name: Loyal
traits.description: While within M of Shiho Hiroto, this model gains +1 to all attack and defence rolls.

traits.name: Pack
traits.description: May be taken in groups of 1 to 3.

special: Faithful spearmen who have followed Hiroto since his exile. Simple and reliable melee fighters.

name: Loyal Kyudoka

traits.name: Ranged (2)
traits.description: This model may make ranged attacks.

traits.name: Loyal
traits.description: While within M of Shiho Hiroto, this model gains +1 to all ranged attack rolls.

traits.name: Pack
traits.description: May be taken in groups of 1 to 3.

special: Dedicated archers. The Loyal prefix means they gain bonuses in Hiroto's presence.

name: Heimin

traits.name: Pack
traits.description: May be taken in groups of 1 to 4.

traits.name: Mob Rule
traits.description: Gains +1 Strength and +1 Defence for each other Heimin within M.

special: Peasant levies — cheap, fragile, but dangerous in numbers. The backbone of Hiroto's guerrilla army.

name: Shiho Misaki

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Acrobat
traits.description: This model ignores movement penalties for terrain.

kiFeats.name: Shadow Step
kiFeats.description: This model may immediately move up to M range ignoring terrain and models.

special: A swift and elusive Shiho warrior. Misaki's mobility makes her excellent for claiming objectives.

name: Shiho Keita

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Resilience (1)
traits.description: Reduce all damage this model suffers by 1 (minimum 1).

kiFeats.name: Stand Firm
kiFeats.description: Until the end of the round, this model cannot be pushed, moved or knocked Prone by enemy effects.

special: A dependable Shiho warrior. Solid melee fighter with good staying power.

name: Shiho Shota

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Quick
traits.description: This model may make one additional move action per activation.

special: A quick-footed Shiho warrior. Shota uses speed to get into position and disrupt enemy plans.

name: Shiho Shirak

traits.name: Ranged (1)
traits.description: This model may make short-range attacks.

traits.name: Guerrilla
traits.description: This model may move after making a ranged attack.

kiFeats.name: Ambush
kiFeats.description: This model may make a free ranged attack against an enemy model that moves within M of this model.

special: A versatile Shiho fighter who excels at guerrilla tactics — shoot and move to avoid retaliation.

name: Shiho Zanji

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Counter-Attack
traits.description: When this model loses a melee exchange, it may immediately make a free attack against the attacker.

kiFeats.name: Riposte
kiFeats.description: Until the end of the round, each time this model loses a melee exchange it may make a free additional melee attack.

special: A skilled duelist who turns opponents' aggression against them. The more he's attacked, the more dangerous he becomes.

name: Maki

traits.name: Medic
traits.description: Once per activation, remove D3 wounds from a friendly model in base contact.

traits.name: Supply Runner
traits.description: This model may move through friendly models without penalty.

kiFeats.name: Field Medicine
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within S recovers D3+1 wounds and removes one Condition marker.

special: The Shiho Clan's field medic. Maki keeps the warband fighting through sustained campaigns.

name: Yoshitaka

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: This model may reroll one dice on each Defence roll.

kiFeats.name: Crushing Blow
kiFeats.description: This model's next melee attack gains +2 damage and ignores Armour.

special: A powerfully built Shiho warrior who hits hard and takes hits equally well.

name: Shiho Eishin

traits.name: Bushido
traits.description: This model may use the Bushido special action.

traits.name: Shugenja
traits.description: This model may use Ki Feats that cost up to 5 Ki.

traits.name: Ward
traits.description: Friendly models within S of this model gain +1 armour.

kiFeats.name: Spirit Shield
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within S is immune to all damage and conditions until the start of your next activation.

kiFeats.name: Binding Ward
kiFeats.description: Target enemy model within M cannot use Ki Feats until the start of your next activation.

special: A Shiho mystic, the newest addition to the clan. Eishin provides spiritual protection and Ki disruption.
